raw_responses.title: ALiBi: Attention with Linear Biases (ICLR 2022)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: head-specific slope m in GEOMETRIC SERIES 2^{-1/H},...,2^{-H/H}; high-slope heads focus local context, low-slope long range; static non-learned bias.

raw_responses.title: Attention with Linear Biases (ALiBi)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: per-head bias slope geometric distribution; m·distance penalty added to attention scores.

raw_responses.title: ALiBi: Attention with Linear Biases (Abhik)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: per-head distance penalty geometric scale, ALiBi mechanism details.

raw_responses.title: On the Emergence of Position Bias in Transformers (2502.01951)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: position bias emergence analysis in transformer.

raw_responses.title: Hallucination Detection LLMs via Spectral Features of Attention Maps (EMNLP 2025)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: LapEigvals top-k eigenvalues of Laplacian of attention maps as hallucination probe input; spectral attention analysis.

raw_responses.title: High-frequency Multi-spectral Attention Domain Generalization (Springer 2025)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: HMCA multi-spectral attention; global domain-invariant features.
